choose.when: SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(COL.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, UPPER(COL.COLUMN_NAME) FIELDNAME, COL.UDT_NAME FIELDTYPE, CASE COL.IS_NULLABLE WHEN 'YES' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END ALLOWNULL, CASE COL.UDT_NAME WHEN 'varchar' THEN COL.CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH ELSE NULL END FIELDLENGTH, REPLACE(COALESCE(COL.COLUMN_DEFAULT, ''), '''', '') DEFAULTVALUE, COL.NUMERIC_PRECISION "PRECISION", COL.NUMERIC_SCALE "SCALE", COALESCE(DES.DESCRIPTION, '') FIELDCOMMENT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS COL LEFT JOIN PG_DESCRIPTION DES ON COL.TABLE_NAME ::REGCLASS = DES.OBJOID AND COL.ORDINAL_POSITION = DES.OBJSUBID WHERE COL.TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION) T
choose.otherwise:
SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT COL.TABLE_NAME TABLENAME, COL.COLUMN_NAME FIELDNAME, COL.DATA_TYPE FIELDTYPE, CASE COL.DATA_TYPE WHEN 'VARCHAR2' THEN TO_CHAR(COL.DATA_LENGTH) WHEN 'VARCHAR' THEN TO_CHAR(COL.DATA_LENGTH) ELSE '' END FIELDLENGTH, DECODE(COL.NULLABLE, 'Y', '1', '0') ALLOWNULL,
REPLACE(NVL(DECODE(COL.DATA_DEFAULT,'NULL','',COL.DATA_DEFAULT),''), '''', '') DEFAULTVALUE,
REPLACE(NVL(DECODE(LONG_TO_CHAR(COL.TABLE_NAME, COL.COLUMN_ID), 'NULL', '', LONG_TO_CHAR(COL.TABLE_NAME, COL.COLUMN_ID)), ''), '''', '') DEFAULTVALUE,
-- LONG_TO_CHAR()依赖自定义的函数转换,NULL为了规避掉默认值不能删除 NVL(COM.COMMENTS, '') FIELDCOMMENT, CASE COL.DATA_TYPE WHEN 'NUMBER' THEN NVL(COL.DATA_PRECISION, 19) WHEN 'INT' THEN 10 WHEN 'BIGINT' THEN 19 ELSE NULL END PRECISION, CASE COL.DATA_TYPE WHEN 'NUMBER' THEN NVL(COL.DATA_SCALE, 0) WHEN 'INT' THEN 0 WHEN 'BIGINT' THEN 0 ELSE NULL END SCALE FROM USER_TAB_COLUMNS COL LEFT JOIN USER_COL_COMMENTS COM ON COL.TABLE_NAME = COM.TABLE_NAME AND COL.COLUMN_NAME = COM.COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY COL.COLUMN_ID) T

choose.when: SELECT UPPER(COL.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, UPPER(COL.COLUMN_NAME) FIELDNAME, COL.UDT_NAME FIELDTYPE, CASE COL.IS_NULLABLE WHEN 'YES' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END ALLOWNULL, CASE COL.UDT_NAME WHEN 'varchar' THEN COL.CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH ELSE NULL END FIELDLENGTH, REPLACE(COALESCE(COL.COLUMN_DEFAULT, ''), '''', '') DEFAULTVALUE, COL.NUMERIC_PRECISION "PRECISION", COL.NUMERIC_SCALE "SCALE", COALESCE(DES.DESCRIPTION, '') FIELDCOMMENT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS COL LEFT JOIN PG_DESCRIPTION DES ON COL.TABLE_NAME ::REGCLASS = DES.OBJOID AND COL.ORDINAL_POSITION = DES.OBJSUBID WHERE COL.TABLE_SCHEMA = CURRENT_SCHEMA() AND UPPER(COL.TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName} ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION
choose.otherwise:
SELECT COL.TABLE_NAME TABLENAME, COL.COLUMN_NAME FIELDNAME, COL.DATA_TYPE FIELDTYPE, CASE COL.DATA_TYPE WHEN 'VARCHAR2' THEN TO_CHAR(COL.DATA_LENGTH) WHEN 'VARCHAR' THEN TO_CHAR(COL.DATA_LENGTH) ELSE '' END FIELDLENGTH, DECODE(COL.NULLABLE, 'Y', '1', '0') ALLOWNULL,
REPLACE(NVL(DECODE(COL.DATA_DEFAULT,'NULL','',COL.DATA_DEFAULT),''), '''', '') DEFAULTVALUE,
REPLACE(NVL(DECODE(LONG_TO_CHAR(COL.TABLE_NAME, COL.COLUMN_ID), 'NULL', '', LONG_TO_CHAR(COL.TABLE_NAME, COL.COLUMN_ID)), ''), '''', '') DEFAULTVALUE,
NVL(COM.COMMENTS, '') FIELDCOMMENT, CASE COL.DATA_TYPE WHEN 'NUMBER' THEN NVL(COL.DATA_PRECISION, 19) WHEN 'INT' THEN 10 WHEN 'BIGINT' THEN 19 ELSE NULL END PRECISION, CASE COL.DATA_TYPE WHEN 'NUMBER' THEN NVL(COL.DATA_SCALE, 0) WHEN 'INT' THEN 0 WHEN 'BIGINT' THEN 0 ELSE NULL END SCALE FROM USER_TAB_COLUMNS COL LEFT JOIN USER_COL_COMMENTS COM ON COL.TABLE_NAME = COM.TABLE_NAME AND COL.COLUMN_NAME = COM.COLUMN_NAME WHERE UPPER(COL.TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName} ORDER BY COL.COLUMN_ID

mapper.select: SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT COL.TABLE_NAME TABLENAME, COL.INDEX_NAME INDEXNAME, LISTAGG(COL.COLUMN_NAME, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY COL.COLUMN_POSITION) INDEXFIELD, (SELECT DECODE(AU.CONSTRAINT_TYPE, 'P', '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@primarykey}', DECODE(IND.UNIQUENESS, 'UNIQUE', '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@unique}', '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@regular}')) FROM USER_INDEXES IND LEFT JOIN USER_CONSTRAINTS AU ON IND.INDEX_NAME = AU.INDEX_NAME AND AU.CONSTRAINT_TYPE = 'P' WHERE IND.INDEX_NAME = COL.INDEX_NAME) INDEXTYPE FROM USER_IND_COLUMNS COL GROUP BY COL.TABLE_NAME, COL.INDEX_NAME ORDER BY INDEXTYPE) T

choose.when: SELECT TABLENAME, INDEXNAME, INDEXTYPE, LISTAGG(COLUMN_NAME, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY COLUMN_POSITION) AS INDEXFIELD FROM (SELECT COL.TABLE_NAME AS TABLENAME, DECODE(AU.CONSTRAINT_TYPE, 'P', AU.CONSTRAINT_NAME, COL.INDEX_NAME ) AS INDEXNAME, COL.COLUMN_NAME, COL.COLUMN_POSITION, DECODE(AU.CONSTRAINT_TYPE, 'P', 'PRIMARYKEY', DECODE(IND.UNIQUENESS, 'UNIQUE', 'UNIQUE', 'REGULAR' ) ) AS INDEXTYPE FROM USER_IND_COLUMNS COL INNER JOIN USER_INDEXES IND ON IND.INDEX_NAME = COL.INDEX_NAME AND IND.TABLE_NAME = 'T_PK_TEST' LEFT JOIN USER_CONSTRAINTS AU ON IND.INDEX_NAME = AU.INDEX_NAME AND AU.TABLE_NAME = 'T_PK_TEST' WHERE COL.TABLE_NAME = 'T_PK_TEST') GROUP BY TABLENAME, INDEXNAME, INDEXTYPE ORDER BY INDEXTYPE
choose.otherwise: SELECT COL.TABLE_NAME TABLENAME, COL.INDEX_NAME INDEXNAME, LISTAGG(COL.COLUMN_NAME, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY COL.COLUMN_POSITION) INDEXFIELD, (SELECT DECODE(AU.CONSTRAINT_TYPE, 'P', '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@primarykey}', DECODE(IND.UNIQUENESS, 'UNIQUE', '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@unique}', '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@regular}')) FROM USER_INDEXES IND LEFT JOIN USER_CONSTRAINTS AU ON IND.INDEX_NAME = AU.INDEX_NAME AND AU.CONSTRAINT_TYPE = 'P' WHERE IND.INDEX_NAME = COL.INDEX_NAME) INDEXTYPE FROM USER_IND_COLUMNS COL WHERE UPPER(COL.TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName} GROUP BY COL.TABLE_NAME, COL.INDEX_NAME ORDER BY INDEXTYPE

mapper.select: SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, COMMENTS TABLEDESC FROM USER_TAB_COMMENTS) T
SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(TAB.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME FROM USER_TABLES TAB WHERE TAB.SECONDARY = 'N' OR TAB.SECONDARY IS NULL /*屏蔽次要表，某些自动生成的表*/ ORDER BY TAB.TABLE_NAME) T
SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(V.VIEW_NAME) VIEWNAME, UPPER(V.VIEW_NAME) TABLENAME, VIEW_SELECT(V.VIEW_NAME) SELECTSTATEMENT FROM USER_VIEWS V ORDER BY V.VIEW_NAME) T

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(TAB.TABLE_NAME) TABLEORVIEWNAME, 'table' DBSTRUCTURETYPE FROM USER_TABLES TAB WHERE TAB.SECONDARY = 'N' OR TAB.SECONDARY IS NULL/*屏蔽次要表，某些自动生成的表*/ UNION SELECT UPPER(V.VIEW_NAME) TABLEORVIEWNAME, 'view' DBSTRUCTURETYPE FROM USER_VIEWS V ORDER BY TABLEORVIEWNAME) T
